name: rung_320_story_temporal_exception_rebinding
utterances: assert rule ancestor(X, Y) :- parent(X, Y).
assert rule ancestor(X, Z) :- parent(X, Y), ancestor(Y, Z).
assert rule in_region(X, Z) :- at(X, Y), inside(Y, Z).
Monastery chapter, rough cut: Nara is Esi's parent. Esi is Tobin's parent. Tobin is Lio's parent.
Set at(tobin, west_archive). Set inside(west_archive, sunmere). Set carries(tobin, seal_ring).

Schedule note from the chapter head: Set before(first_bell, oath_reading). Set before(oath_reading, river_launch). Set before(river_launch, night_fire). Set before(first_bell, night_fire). Set occurs_on(river_launch, day_8).
Quick question before the storm note lands: is Nara already an ancestor of Lio, and does river_launch still sit on day_8?
Storm exception, middle beat only: retract before(oath_reading, river_launch).
Storm exception continuation: Set before(oath_reading, repair_vigil). Set before(repair_vigil, river_launch).
Family rebinding from the corrected folio: retract parent(esi, tobin).
Family rebinding continuation: Set parent(mara, tobin). Set parent(nara, mara).
Quiet cleanup after that: retract carries(tobin, seal_ring).
Quiet cleanup continuation: Set carries(lio, seal_ring).
Location continuation: Set at(tobin, south_walk). Set inside(south_walk, sunmere).
Final revised-state query: query ancestor(nara, lio). Query occurs_on(river_launch, day_9). Query at(tobin, south_walk).
